NEXTAUTH_SECRET.description: Random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

NEXTAUTH_URL.description: Your full deployment URL, e.g. https://aria-dashboard.vercel.app — you can update this after first deploy

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console. See docs/deploy-guide.md for setup.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: From console.anthropic.com — leave blank if using DEMO_MODE=true

DEMO_MODE.description: Set to 'true' to run with sample data (no real API keys needed). Recommended for first deploy.
